prompt: Keep the draft inside Enron, ask Gerald Nemec and Sara Shackleton for review, and hold the outside send.
summary: Instead of sending the draft Master Firm Purchase/Sale Agreement to Cargill, Debra retains it internally and requests review from Gerald Nemec and Sara Shackleton, instructing them to hold any outside transmission.

messages.subject: Master Agreement — Draft for Internal Review
messages.body_text:
Gerald,

Attached is a draft Master Firm Purchase/Sale Agreement prepared for Cargill. Please review the commercial and operational provisions and send any comments or redlines by EOD Thursday. Do not forward this outside Enron — hold any outreach to Cargill until Sara and I have coordinated on credit/legal points.

Thanks,
Debra Perlingiere
messages.rationale: Solicit Gerald's commercial review while keeping the draft internal and preventing premature external distribution.

messages.subject: Master Agreement — Draft for Legal/Credit Review
messages.body_text:
Sara,

Attached is the draft Master Firm Purchase/Sale Agreement we were preparing for Cargill. Please review credit, indemnity and other legal terms and advise any necessary changes. Please do not send this to Cargill yet — hold until Gerald and I have consolidated internal comments. Can you provide feedback by EOD Thursday?

Regards,
Debra Perlingiere
messages.rationale: Obtain Sara's legal and credit input and explicitly instruct to hold external transmission until internal consensus is reached.

top_subjects: Master Agreement — Draft for Legal/Credit Review
Master Agreement — Draft for Internal Review
notes: Recipient scope was clamped to internal Enron participants.
